personalContext.summary: Bilingual in English and French, with interests in AI, NLP, and data science.

topOfMind.summary: Currently focusing on implementing a conversational interface using React and Python, exploring the use of graph neural networks for text classification, and tracking recent advancements in deep learning models for NLP applications. recentMonths.summary: Recently explored TensorFlow and Keras for building neural networks, worked on a project involving text classification using deep learning models, and investigated the use of graph neural networks for text analysis. Demonstrated interest in natural language processing.

longTermBackground.summary: Founded expertise in computer vision and deep learning models for image processing and object detection. Demonstrated proficiency in Python programming languages and experience with machine learning frameworks.
